title: Freshly Smoked American Lamb Casserole
description: A comforting American dish featuring freshly chopped parsley and smoked lamb, perfect for a crisp evening. This macrobiotic-friendly casserole is made with wholesome ingredients and a focus on natural flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, ground lamb, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked onion and garlic mixture to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Stir in the freshly chopped parsley.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
